title: Geepas Hair Trimmer | Electric Stubble Beard Trimmer with Pro Shield for Precise Trimming with Maximum Protection | Cordless Hair Clipper, USB Charging, IPX5 Waterproof | Rechargeable Li-ion Battery

features: ✅ CUTTER HEAD SETTINGS – 5 adjustable length settings 0.5, 1.0, 1.3, 1.6, 1.9 mm provide ultimate control and precision on all beard lengths. The comb easily trims the beard by locking the hair and trimming at the end giving a fine cut. Make different beard and hairstyles.

✅ TRIM, EDGE, MORE STYLING OPTIONS – Includes 2 haircut Guide combs ranging from (2-4 mm & 5-7mm) length to give you more styling options than ever. Now you can try out the latest styles in the same professional way. Creates fine lines, contours and details, great hair trimmer for men.

✅ STAINLESS STEEL BLADE ALLOY – Blades are designed with stainless steel for superior performance. The finer the teeth, the finer the quality. Rechargeable multi-cut hair clipper features the power drive cutting system that cuts through even the thickest hair. It ensures maximum durability and ensure the best cutting performance.

✅ RECHARGEABLE & UP TO 60 MIN WORKING TIME - Long-lasting rechargeable Lithium battery with a run time of up to 1 Hour with a charging time of 1.5 hours. Quiet, low noise superior performance haircut machine.
✅ LED LIGHT, ON/OFF SWITCH – Simple on off switch for easy operation. built in 4000K LED Light with 2 color LED indicator which boosts cutting speed.
description: Product Description STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Blades are designed with stainless steel for superior performance. LED INDICATOR AND LIGHT Simple on off switch for easy operation. built in 4000K LED Light with 2 color LED indicator which boosts cutting speed. CORDLESS & RECHARGEABLE Rechargeable Lithium battery with a run time of up to 1 Hour with a charging time of 1.5 hours. WATERPROOF DESIGN Allows for easy cleaning and grooming in the shower. TRIM, EDGE AND SHAVE 5 adjustable length settings 0.5, 1.0, 1.3, 1.6, 1.9 mm provide ultimate control and precision on all beard lengths. MULTIFUNCTIONAL CLIPPER Now you can try out the latest styles in the same professional way. Creates fine lines, contours and details, great hair trimmer for men. INCLUDES 4 ACCESSORIES Includes 2 haircut Guide combs ranging from (2-4 mm & 5-7mm) length to give you more styling options than ever. EASY TO CLEAN WITH BRUSH Cleaning brush and oil. It is compact, very easy and lightweight.
